features.description: CLAUDE.md updated for all modified modules (watch, server, clickhouse)

layers.name: structural
layers.command: test -f src/watch/CLAUDE.md && test -f src/server/CLAUDE.md && test -f src/clickhouse/CLAUDE.md && echo PASS
layers.fail_message: One or more CLAUDE.md files missing

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: for m in src/watch src/server src/clickhouse; do grep -q 'Parent Context' "$m/CLAUDE.md" && grep -q 'Directory Structure' "$m/CLAUDE.md" && grep -q 'Key Patterns' "$m/CLAUDE.md" && grep -q 'Parent Rules' "$m/CLAUDE.md" || exit 1; done && echo VALID
